title: One column covering another - resizing doesn't fix - not sure what to do
excerpt: If you look at the item name column, it is covering the status column. How do I get it to stop doing this?

Can you try the following steps?

  • Try reproducing the issue in an incognito window.
  • Try accessing the platform through a different web browser: List of our supported browsers.

Let us know if the issue persists!
